content: {"cards": [{"name": "Temple Guardian", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"The sacred halls shall know no corruption while I draw breath.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Vanilla common creature that passes the vanilla test. 2/4 for 3 mana is slightly above rate for the defensive body, fitting white's protective nature. Clean stats with no abilities to test restraint in design."}, {"name": "Skyward Pilgrim", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Cleric", "oracle_text": "Flying", "flavor_text": "Faith lifts the spirit above earthly concerns.", "power": "1", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple keyword-only creature with flying, white's secondary evergreen keyword. 1/2 flying for 2 mana is appropriately costed for common, providing evasion without being overpowered."}, {"name": "Divine Banishment", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": "\"Your presence offends the divine order.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's exile-based removal at uncommon. Restricted to mana value 3 or less to prevent it from being too powerful. Double white in cost emphasizes white's commitment requirement for premium removal effects."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card. Scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge reveals the path forward.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic blue cantrip that draws a card and includes scry 1 as a minor additional effect. Properly costed at 2 mana for common, following the template of similar effects like Opt but with slightly higher cost for the extra card."}, {"name": "Arcane Rejection", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target spell with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": "\"Your magic lacks the sophistication required.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Conditional counterspell at uncommon that targets spells with mana value 3 or less. This creates interesting gameplay decisions about what to counter while being more limited than unconditional counterspells. Appropriately costed for the restriction."}]}
